RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crsp_next_schemaidgen.sql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_next_schemaidgen$( \\ out NextId smallint ) \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ begin atomic \\ if not exists ( \\ select * \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$ ) \\ then \\ insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 ( \\ slice_id, \\ next_id ) \\ values ( \\ $Slice$, \\ 1 ); \\ end if; \\ \\ select next_id \\ into NextId \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$ \\ for update; \\ \\ update $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 \\ set next_id = NextId + 1 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$; \\ end; \\ end

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_next_schemaidgen$( \\ out NextId int ) \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ begin atomic \\ if not exists ( \\ select * \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$ ) \\ then \\ insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 ( \\ slice_id, \\ next_id ) \\ values ( \\ $Slice$, \\ 1 ); \\ end if; \\ \\ select next_id \\ into NextId \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$ \\ for update; \\ \\ update $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 \\ set next_id = NextId + 1 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$; \\ end; \\ end

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_next_schemaidgen$( \\ out NextId bigint ) \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ begin atomic \\ if not exists ( \\ select * \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$ ) \\ then \\ insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 ( \\ slice_id, \\ next_id ) \\ values ( \\ $Slice$, \\ 1 ); \\ end if; \\ \\ select next_id \\ into NextId \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$ \\ for update; \\ \\ update $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 \\ set next_id = NextId + 1 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$; \\ end; \\ end
